output: {"match_id": "m026", "winner": "A", "rationale": "Both seeds target redundant_tool_invocation with N=1 minimum-call paths and well-defined traps. A also plants four distinct trap classes (re-auth, attendee lookup, clock conversion, read-back) versus B's three, and A's developer prompt explicitly forbids re-fetching, making over-cautious behavior a clearer instruction-following failure. Cleaner target-dim isolation wins."}
